sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54470" key="katamantei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταμαντ-εία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n54470.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divination</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jul.Laod.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5(1).190</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
